span.p:
AdjacencyStore
• forward: HashMap<LabelId, DirectedAdjacency>
• backward: HashMap<LabelId, DirectedAdjacency>
• edge_meta: HashMap<EdgeId, EdgeMeta>
• pair_index: HashMap<(Src,Tgt), SmallVec<EdgeId>>
• node_bitmap: RoaringTreemap

div.style: color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PropertyStore
• node_properties: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<(Key,Value)>>
• edge_properties: HashMap<EdgeId, Vec<(Key,Value)>>
• property_index: HashMap<key, HashMap<val, Vec<NodeId>>>

div.style: color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VectorIndex (HNSW)
• usearch Index (m=16, ef=200)
• node ↔ key bidirectional maps
• raw vectors: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<f32>>

div.style: color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TextIndex (BM25)
• inverted index
• term frequencies
• document lengths

div.style: color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Write-Ahead Log
• Append-only file
• [u32 len][bincode entry]
• CRC32 per entry
• Sync: Always / EverySecond / Never

div.style: color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Snapshot Engine
• Full state serialization (bincode)
• SnapshotMeta: timestamp, version, checksum
• Interval: 3600s default
